name: Maxferd Jewelry & Loan of Beverly Hills
description_short: Beverly Hills pawn shop offering collateral-based loans on jewelry, watches, precious metals, and electronics with no credit check. Established 1884, located near Rodeo Drive.
description_long:
Maxferd Jewelry & Loan has operated since 1884, making it one of the longest-established pawn operations in the United States. The Beverly Hills location is situated at 9640 S. Santa Monica Boulevard, near Rodeo Drive, positioning it as a luxury-focused pawn shop serving the affluent Beverly Hills market. The company emphasizes fair pricing, client confidentiality, and high-end service standards.

Maxferd offers collateral-based loans secured by jewelry, fine watches, precious metals, coins, diamonds, gemstones, electronics (DSLR cameras, Apple products, laptops), musical instruments, luxury handbags, collectibles, and art. The loan process is designed for speed—applicants can receive cash in under an hour after providing valid identification and signing a contract. New customers qualify for a promotional 0% interest rate on loans under $2,500 with the option to roll over at the end of a four-month period without additional interest. The company also provides in-house jewelry repair services, including restoration, stone setting, cleaning, sizing, polishing, and plating, plus a layaway program for purchases.

What distinguishes Maxferd is its 140+ year history, specialization in high-end items (luxury watches, designer handbags, fine jewelry), in-house expert jewelers, and focus on client confidentiality. The company explicitly states loans "won't be reported if you can't repay," appealing to borrowers concerned about credit reporting. No credit check is required, and the location near Rodeo Drive attracts customers seeking to buy or sell luxury goods.

The primary limitation is the business model's inherent constraint: loans are secured by collateral, making it unsuitable for those without valuable items to pledge. Interest rates above the promotional period are not specified on the website. The company operates limited hours (10 AM–5:45 PM Monday–Saturday, closed Sundays) and serves primarily the Beverly Hills area, though they mention an online store. Like all pawn shops, the service is transactional rather than relationship-based credit building.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 0% interest promotional loans for new clients on single loans under $2,500 with roll-over option
Cash in hand in under one hour with no credit check required
Loans not reported to credit bureaus if unpaid, protecting credit score
Expert in-house jewelry repair and restoration services on-site
Accepts wide range of collateral including luxury watches, designer handbags, electronics, and art
140+ year operating history (since 1884) with established reputation
Specializes in high-end/luxury items with expertise in fine jewelry and watches
cons: Limited to customers with valuable collateral; not accessible for those without pledgeable assets
Interest rates after promotional period not disclosed on website
Restricted hours (closed Sundays, closes at 5:45 PM weekdays) may inconvenience some borrowers
Primarily serves Beverly Hills area; requires in-person visit for loan origination
Loan repayment timeline unclear; typical pawn loans are short-term with strict redemption deadlines
best_for: Luxury goods owners (watches, jewelry, handbags) needing immediate cash without credit checks
High-net-worth individuals in Beverly Hills seeking confidential short-term collateral loans
People with valuable items to sell or pawn without undergoing formal credit evaluation
Jewelry owners needing expert repair and appraisal services from certified craftspeople
diagnosis: Maxferd is best for Beverly Hills-area residents and luxury goods owners who need fast cash secured by collateral and want to avoid credit checks and credit reporting. The main caveat is that this service requires pledging valuable items as collateral and is limited to short-term, transactional lending rather than credit-building or long-term financing solutions.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on jewelry, watches, and precious metals
Secured loans on electronics (DSLR cameras, Apple products, laptops, computers)
Pawn loans on luxury handbags, art, and collectibles
Jewelry repair and restoration services (sizing, polishing, stone setting, plating, link repair)
Purchase and sale of gold, precious metals, coins, and loose diamonds
Luxury watch buying and selling services
Designer handbag buying and selling services
Layaway program for store inventory purchases
Cash payment options (in-person cash, wire transfer, or check)
Online store shopping for pre-owned jewelry and luxury items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 9640 S Santa Monica Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90210
